# Flexily

High-performance flexbox layout engine. Yoga-compatible API with zero-allocation architecture.

## Documentation
- Getting Started: https://flexily.dev/guide/getting-started
- API Reference: https://flexily.dev/api/
- Benchmarks: https://flexily.dev/benchmarks/

## Source
- GitHub: https://github.com/beorn/flexily
- npm: @flexily/core
